name: companion
description: Render Claude's work as HTML artifacts in the Companion overlay. Two modes: 'agent' (Claude auto-renders when judgment says it helps) and 'manual' (pull-only via /html). Flip with /companion:mode. Includes interactive review artifacts (click ✓/✎/✗ on items to batch feedback to clipboard) and ambient inline comments (hover any block to drop a question on it). Pairs with the Companion Overlay app (installed separately).
